Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x224C "FROGGER64-07E3-224C" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07e3 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Frogger 64.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Put some init code at $07E3 to set a magic value of $0F at $02 before starting the game.
